content.text:
[cron:rules-refresh-daily Cursor协作规则刷新] 【每日规则刷新】请记住以下 Cursor 协作规则（每天提醒一次）：

1. 当用户要求让 Cursor 做某件事时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --title "任务标题" --instructions "具体指令" --submitted-by "OpenClaw" --notify

2. 当用户回复了 Cursor 发来的飞书确认消息时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\confirm_write.py" --task-id "task_id" --decision auto --reply "用户回复原文"

3. 查看当前 Cursor 任务队列：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --list

4. 查看已完成任务结果：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --results

以上规则已写入 AGENTS.md，请确认记住。无需回复，静默确认即可。
Current time: Monday, May 18th, 2026 — 09:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-05-18 01:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
This is a cron job reminder about Cursor collaboration rules. The instructions say "无需回复，静默确认即可" (No reply needed, just silently confirm). So I should just acknowledge silently and not send any response.

Actually, looking at this more carefully - this is a cron job task that fires daily. The system prompt says "Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically." But the instruction also says "无需回复，静默确认即可" (no reply needed, silently confirm).

For a cron job that delivers its result automatically, I should just return a brief acknowledgment. Let me think about what to return...

The cron is set up to trigger this system event daily. The content says to remember the Cursor collaboration rules and that no reply is needed. So I should simply confirm I've noted these rules.

Given the "静默确认即可" instruction, I'll keep it very brief.

content.text: 已收到并记住 Cursor 协作规则。任务队列提交、确认消息转达、列表查看、结果查看四件事已确认。
